import json, os, pandas as pd, numpy as np, math, re, unicodedata, difflib, string, collections, itertools, statistics
with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)
with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)
len(quran_data), len(hadith_data)

# Search for the term "مستنجذون" in the raw and normalized texts
term = "مستنجذون"
hits = []
for i, row in enumerate(quran_data):
    ayah = row.get('ayah_text','')
    if term in ayah:
        hits.append((i, ayah))
len(hits), hits[:3]

candidates = [
"فَأَسْرِ بِعِبَادِي لَيْلًا إِنَّكُمْ مُتَّبَعُونَ",
"وَأَوْحَيْنَا إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِي إِنَّكُمْ مُتَّبَعُونَ",
"وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِي فَاضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِي الْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لَا تَخَافُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ",
"فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍ مِنَ اللَّيْلِ وَاتَّبِعْ أَدْبَارَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنْكُمْ أَحَدٌ وَامْضُوا حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ",
"فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍ مِنَ اللَّيْلِ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنْكُمْ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا امْرَأَتَكَ ۖ إِنَّهُ مُصِيبُهَا مَا أَصَابَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ مَوْعِدَهُمُ الصُّبْحُ ۚ أَلَيْسَ الصُّبْحُ بِقَرِيبٍ"
]
[(cand, sim_ratio(original_span,cand), lcs_ratio(original_span, cand), token_f1(original_span, cand)) for cand in candidates]

# Search for "مستنجدون" 
term = "مستنجدون"
hits = []
for r in quran_data:
    if term in r['ayah_text']:
        hits.append(r['ayah_text'])
len(hits), hits[:5]

candidate = "سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي أَسْرَىٰ بِعَبْدِهِ لَيْلًا مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ الْأَقْصَى الَّذِي بَارَكْنَا حَوْلَهُ لِنُرِيَهُ مِنْ آيَاتِنَا ۚ إِنَّهُ هُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْبَصِيرُ"
sim_ratio(original_span, candidate), lcs_ratio(original_span,candidate), token_f1(original_span, candidate)

# Build list of ayah texts
ayah_texts = [r['ayah_text'] for r in quran_data]

def best_matches(text, topn=10):
    scores=[]
    for i, ayah in enumerate(ayah_texts):
        r1=sim_ratio(text, ayah)
        r2=lcs_ratio(text, ayah)
        r3=token_f1(text, ayah)
        # combined maybe average plus weight
        comb = (r1 + r2 + r3)/3
        scores.append((comb, r1, r2, r3, i, ayah))
    scores.sort(reverse=True)
    return scores[:topn]

best = best_matches(original_span, topn=10)
[(round(c[0],3), round(c[1],3), round(c[2],3), round(c[3],3), c[5][:80]) for c in best]
